overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character walking at night around the Palace of Fine Arts in San Francisco. The character follows a curved pathway alongside a reflecting pool, passing other pedestrians while illuminated classical columns line the route, with warm artificial lighting creating dramatic shadows against the night sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: paved walkway with classical colonnade and planters

events.description: character briefly steps onto grass area to the right of the main path

agents.ego_description: walking along a paved path next to a classical building with tall illuminated columns, passing pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in white shirt walking toward the camera
pedestrian in blue shirt walking in the same direction

entered.detail: row of tall illuminated stone columns with ornate capitals
small ground bollard lights illuminating the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking along a paved pathway at night, with a magnificent classical colonnade of illuminated stone columns on the right. Large concrete planters and a trash receptacle line the path, while small bollard lights provide warm illumination. Other pedestrians walk in opposing directions along the same route.

scene_state.functional_zone: curved waterfront promenade with colonnade on left

events.description: path opens up to reveal a large reflecting pool on the right side
character passes a pedestrian in a green top walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: continuing along the curved path with the colonnade now on the left and the reflecting pool on the right

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in green shirt and shorts walking toward the camera

entered.detail: calm body of water reflecting the warm night lights
domed classical building visible at the end of the colonnade

segments.scene_description: As the pathway curves, the scene opens to reveal a serene reflecting pool on the right, with the illuminated colonnade now running along the left side. The domed rotunda becomes visible in the distance at the end of the column row. The character continues walking along this waterfront promenade, passing other pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront path with residential buildings across the water

events.description: moon becomes visible through the cloudy night sky

agents.ego_description: walking along the waterfront with residential buildings visible across the reflecting pool, passing occasional pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking toward the camera along the water's edge

entered.detail: residential buildings with warm yellow lighting across the reflecting pool
mature trees lining the water's edge with dense foliage

segments.scene_description: The path continues along the water's edge with the colonnade receding into the distance on the left. Across the calm reflecting pool, warmly lit residential buildings create a picturesque backdrop. The moon becomes visible through the cloudy sky as the character passes pedestrians walking along the waterfront.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-shaded pathway near the end of the colonnade

events.description: path enters a more densely treed area with overhead canopy

agents.ego_description: continuing along the path as it curves through a more densely vegetated area, approaching the end of the colonnade structure

notable_agents.action: two pedestrians walking together ahead on the pathway

entered.detail: thick tree canopy overhead blocking portions of the sky
classical stone statue visible near the base of the columns

segments.scene_description: The pathway curves into a more densely vegetated area with thick tree canopy overhead. The colonnade approaches its end on the left, where a classical stone statue becomes visible. The reflecting pool and distant buildings are no longer in view as the character continues through this shaded section of the park.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a nighttime promenade that shifts from a grand classical colonnade to a secluded, wooded park area. It begins with the character walking past illuminated stone columns and concrete planters, passing other pedestrians under the warm glow of bollard lights. As the pathway curves, the scene opens to reveal a serene reflecting pool on the right while the colonnade shifts to the left, leading the eye toward a distant domed rotunda. The camera continues along the water's edge, where the calm pool reflects warmly lit residential buildings under a cloudy, moonlit sky. Finally, the path curves away from the water and into a densely vegetated area, passing a classical stone statue before disappearing under a thick canopy of trees.
